code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut num = 0
mut out = ""
mut first = true

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      num = 0
      sign = 1
    end
    num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45
    if in_num
      let v = sign * num * 2
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    end
    in_num = true
    num = 0
    sign = -1
  else
    if in_num
      let v = sign * num * 2
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let v = sign * num * 2
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end

println(out)
